title: Daewoo 2 Slice Toaster – Black, Compact, Variable Browning Control, Defrost, Reheat, Cancel Functions, Removable Crumb Tray, Ideal for Home, Student, Office Kitchens
features: VERSATILE 2 SLICE TOASTER – Perfect for everyday use, whether you're preparing quick breakfasts, office snacks, or a comforting late-night toast
VARIABLE BROWNING CONTROL – Easily adjust the dial to get your toast just how you like it, from lightly golden to deep and crunchy
MULTI-FUNCTION SETTINGS – Features Defrost, Reheat, and Cancel functions for ultimate flexibility, perfect for frozen bread or reheating forgotten toast
CLEAN AND TIDY – The removable crumb tray ensures easy cleaning and mess-free countertops after every use
COMPACT, STYLISH DESIGN – Finished in clean white with a slim profile, it’s ideal for kitchens with limited counter space, dorms, or office break rooms

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2 Slice toaster, Cancel option, Reheat option, Defrost option, 6 Browning settings, LED light indicator, Removable crumb tray, Cord storage, Part of a collection for mix and match
